org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce.LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy

Packages that use LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce
Connection package for Lettuce Redis client.

  • Uses of LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy in org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce

    Methods in org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce that return LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy
    LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy.buffered(int bufferSize)
    Return a policy to buffer commands and to flush once reaching the configured bufferSize.
    static LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy
    LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy.flushEachCommand()
    Return a policy to flush after each command (default behavior).
    static LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy
    LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy.flushOnClose()
    Return a policy to flush only if LettuceConnection.closePipeline() is called.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce with parameters of type LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    LettuceConnection.setPipeliningFlushPolicy(LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy pipeliningFlushPolicy)
    Configures the flushing policy when using pipelining.
    void
    LettuceConnectionFactory.setPipeliningFlushPolicy(LettuceConnection.PipeliningFlushPolicy pipeliningFlushPolicy)
    Configures the flushing policy when using pipelining.
